headline: Digital Asset Eyes $2 Billion Valuation In A16z-Led Crypto Raise
summary: Digital Asset is raising roughly $300 million as Canton Network gains traction despite weaker crypto venture funding.

raw.headline: Digital Asset Eyes $2 Billion Valuation In A16z-Led Crypto Raise
raw.summary: Digital Asset is raising roughly $300 million as Canton Network gains traction despite weaker crypto venture funding.

headline: BNY Announces Planned Change of Stock Ticker Symbol to "BNY"
summary: BNY, a global financial services company, today announced that it will change the ticker symbol for the common stock of The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation from "BK" to "BNY".

raw.headline: BNY Announces Planned Change of Stock Ticker Symbol to "BNY"
raw.summary: BNY, a global financial services company, today announced that it will change the ticker symbol for the common stock of The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation from "BK" to "BNY".
